calendar.matters:
Petitioner'S Motion For Preliminary Injunction
Off Calendar Aug-20-2012 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
No appearance on this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling. Petitioner'S Motion For Preliminary Injunction is To be heard by Judge McBride on August 20, 2012 at 3:30 pm in Department 220. Judge: James J. McBride; Clerk: Gina Gonzales; Not Reported.

Petitioner'S Motion For Preliminary Injunction
Off Calendar Aug-20-2012 Denied
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for hearing on petitioner San Francisco Deputy Sheriffs Association's motion for preliminary injunction.
Dept. 220, Judge: James J. McBride, Clerk: Kevin Dougherty, CSR: Sherry Sawyer, #5976.

Peter Hoffman, Esq. appeared for petitioner San Francisco Sheriffs' Association.
Rafael Ofierski, Esq. appeared for respondent City & County of San Francisco.

3:55 p.m. - The case is called and counsel state their respective appearances.
3:56 p.m. - The Court hears oral argument by counsel.
3:59 p.m. - The Court asks counsel is the mandatory meet & confer has occurred. It has, but according to counsel, it was unproductive.
4:00 p.m. - The Court ordes counsel to meet & confer.
4:12 p.m. - After hearing argument from counsel, and good cause appearing, the Court rules as follows: Petitioner's request for issuance of a preliminary injunction is DENIED. Counsel for respondent shall prepare the Order After Hearing, and submit same to the Court for review.

Petitioner'S Motion For Preliminary Injunction
Off Calendar Aug-17-2012 Continued To Aug-20-12 At 03:30 P.M. In Dept 220
MINI MINUTES:
No appearance on this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling as modified: PETITIONER'S MOTION FOR PRELIMINARY INJUNCTION is Continued to August 20, 2012 at 3:30 PM in Department 220 to be heard by Judge McBride per CCP 170.6 challenge to Judge Goldsmith. Judge: Ernest H. Goldsmith; Clerk: Gina Gonzales; Court Reporter: Sherry Sawyer CSR # 5976
